strengths: 20 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure roles exceeds the 15-year requirement
Demonstrated technical leadership through staff-level positions and exceptional ability to inspire and educate via workshops, talks, and public projects
Polyglot engineer with deep full-stack capabilities spanning TypeScript, DLang, Java, C++, and infrastructure tools
concerns: AI/ML expertise limited to recent infrastructure work (MCP tooling for agentic workflows as of April 2025); no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or ML systems built
No advanced degree in AI/ML field; both degrees are in Computer Science and Fine Arts—not AI-specialized, contradicting the preferred qualification
No evidence of strategic customer or partner advisory experience despite this being a core responsibility; background shows internal technical contributions only
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates strong technical fundamentals with proven leadership ability. However, they lack the core qualifications for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI Strategy. AI experience is limited to recent infrastructure tooling work (MCP code generators) rather than recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms. There is no evidence of the strategic customer advisory experience necessary to "advise strategic customers and partners on adopting cutting-edge cloud and AI technologies." The candidate lacks an advanced degree in AI-related fields. While excellent for infrastructure or platform engineering roles, they are not positioned for this AI-strategy-focused principal role.
